# Aurora 2.0 General Availability

## Direct Answer
Aurora 2.0 became generally available either on 14 March 2026 or 18 March 2026, depending on the consulted record. [[release-notes]][[status-archive]]

## Findings
Release engineering announced Aurora 2.0 general availability on 14 March 2026. [[release-notes]] Conversely, the production deployment record lists the general availability date as 18 March 2026. [[status-archive]]

## Limitations and Contradictions
The sources present a four-day discrepancy between the announcement date and the deployment record date. [[release-notes]][[status-archive]] The release notes do not specify when the production deployment record was updated, and the status archive provides no explanation for why its date differs from the release engineering announcement. [[release-notes]][[status-archive]]

## Sources
* Aurora 2.0 Release Notes [[release-notes]]
* Aurora Production Status Archive [[status-archive]]
